responsibilities: Worked as a Backend Developer on an e-commerce Android application, contributing to the migration of the backend system from PHP to node.js for better performance and scalability.
Develop and maintained RESTful APIs using Nodejs and Express, handling core business logic for products, users, orders and payments.
Integrated MongoDB for efficient data storage and retrieval, optimised queries and ensure data consistency during the transition phase.
Migrated existing backend functionalities from legacy PHP codebase to Node.js ensuring backward compatibility and minimal downtime.
Implemented new features while maintaining and refactoring existing modules to improve core quality and system stability.
Collaborated with frontend and Android teams to align API contracts and support CS feature integration.
Assisted in debunking production issues, improving error handling and monitoring API performance.
Completed a Python internship at CodSoft, successfully executed various projects demonstrating proficiency in Python programming, including the development of simple applications and tools.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Internet of Things (IoT)
education.institution: Sri Indu College of Engineering and Technology, Sheriguda
